text: - 1)  Kitchen, Bars, Bathrooms and Common area Granite Countertop system including without limitation all nails, glue, fasteners, blocking, shims and other accessories necessary to provide a complete installation located on all apartment buildings as well as the clubhouse.  Excess materials shall be consolidated and moved forward by the subcontractor for his use in the execution of his work or removed from the project site.  Subcontractor acknowledges that he is responsible for all material shortages or overruns.  Contractor accepts no responsibility for supplying additional material, any receiving, inventory, storage or handling of any material required for this Scope of Work.
